heading: Purpose
label: 4501 Purpose
text: It is the purpose of this chapter to establish the James Madison Fellowship Program which is designed to encourage graduate study of the American Constitution, its roots, its formation, its principles, and its development.
notes: Codificationis a corrected version of .Pub. L. 99–591Pub. L. 99–500
